proverb_en: When shepherds quarrel, the wolf has a winning game
context_native: A: 咱们组的小明一直跟我对着干，我想找个机会把他拉下马。。。B: 最近隔壁组的老王对咱们组的资源虎视眈眈，你小心鹬蚌相争，渔人得利。
context_en: A: Michael in our group has been fighting against me. I want to find a chance to pull him down. . . B: Recently, Mr. Smith from the next-door group is staring at the resources of our group. Be careful when shepherds quarrel, the wolf has a winning game.
label: figurative
